title: Runic Combat
description: Overhauls combat by adding runes, special gear effects that you can give to your armor/weapons!
body:
**IMPORTANT NOTE: THIS MOD IS FOR PVP PURPOSES, IT WILL BE BALANCED AS SUCH**

This mod adds runes to the game, which allow you to add special effects and abilities to your weapons and armor!

The rune table is used to apply them, just put the weapon/armor onto the table (right click) and than right click the table with whatever rune you want to add!

it is reccommended to use a mod such as ukus armor hud to see cooldowns, and a mod like jei/rei to allow viewing recipes easier.

**this mod also rebalances some enchantments and removes durability.**

**enchantment changes include:** removal of unbreaking, mending, and thorns due to removal of durability
fire aspect and channeling enchantments are also removed due to being replaced by runes

**runes added by the mod**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Hasty:** permanant haste 1 while equipped

**Poison Aura:** click the corrosponding keybind to give poison to every mob/player nearby for 5 seconds

**Channeling:** gives the channeling status effect, dealing damage over time while in water, and if you hit a mob with the channeling status effect with a channeling rune(or weapon with the rune) it deals extra damage

**Fire aspect:** sets enemies on fire

**dash:** allows you to dash with the corrosponding keybind

**double jump:** allows you to double jump by pressing your jump key while in the air

**Lunge:** Allows you to jump while in the air giving a horizontal boost in the primary direction you are moving

**Graceful:** Gives you the dolphins grace status effect

**OverCharge:** Makes you able to wait a bit to attack for extra damage, also gives slowness, and while on armor it gives strength

</details>
